case_title: PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP DBA STONESTOWN APARTMENTS vs. SHIPP, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP DBA STONESTOWN APARTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT SHIPP, ROBERT SHIPP, ELLEN SHIPP, NISSA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP DBA STONESTOWN APARTMENTS COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-11-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHIPP, ROBERT SHIPP, ELLEN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $37.74 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISITION CORP DBA STONESTOWN APARTMENTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHIPP, ROBERT SHIPP, ELLEN
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. DEF. HELEN SHIPP PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEF. ROBERT SHIPP NOT PRESENT, BUT MRS. SHIPP AUTHORIZED TO ENTER INTO THIS SETTLEMENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 330 BUCKINGHAM WAY, #302, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 4-30-94 - $1,698.72 RENT & DAMAGES - NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION - DEF. WARRANTS SHE & HUSBAND ARE SOLE ADULTS IN POSSESSION - ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED $980 SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - EACH TO BEAR THEIR COSTS - UPON PMT. & VACATING AS AGREED BY DEF, PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISMISS. PL. ATTY TO PRE- PARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIPP, ROBERT SHIPP, ELLEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 330 BUCKINGHAM WAY, #102, S.F, CA. $1,698.72 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,698.72, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1994, $980 SEC. DEP. RETAINED BY PL. TO DEFRAY ATTY. FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. DEF. ONLY ADULTS IN POSSESSION OF PREMISES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
